vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-653: Hotfix commits on main get silently lost: persistent stuck state, Deacon respect, Activity visibility

plan.title: Hotfix commits on main get silently lost: persistent stuck state, Deacon respect, Activity visibility
plan.author: agent:claude-opus-4-6

narratives.Problem: Hotfix commits pushed to origin/main are silently clobbered by concurrent approve-flow merges. Root cause is a check-then-act race in workspaces.ts approve handler (pull, merge, push without re-fetch). The failure is invisible because activity log is in-memory, stuck is a derived heuristic not a flag, and Deacon would infinite-loop respawn any workspace marked stuck.
narratives.Proposal: Ship all three phases as one coupled change. Phase 1 stops the bleed: Deacon-respect first, then persistent stuck columns on review_status, then pre-push divergence guard in approve + salvage paths, then unstick UI. Phase 2 makes it visible: thin git helper wrapper emitting structured git.* events to a new git_operations SQLite table, pattern-matched tmux streaming from the merge-agent specialist, concurrent-merge detection, and activity panel UX (group/filter/pin). Phase 3 fixes the kanban stuck-count to be the union of persistent stuck flag and inactivity heuristic.

items.title: Deacon respect: skip workspaces with stuck=true

narrative.Action: In src/lib/cloister/deacon.ts around lines 1960-2035, modify patrolWorkAgentResolutions and any stuck-poke / respawn code path so that workspaces whose review_status.stuck = 1 are skipped entirely. Key by issueId, not agentId, so respawned agents with new IDs still match. Must ship before any marking logic so the first stuck-mark is not instantly clobbered by an infinite respawn loop.

subItems.title: patrolWorkAgentResolutions skips iterations where review_status.stuck = 1 for the agent's issueId
Ephemeral specialist force-kill/respawn path also checks the flag and bails out
Unit test: patrol run with a mocked stuck issue produces zero poke/respawn actions

items.title: Persistent stuck state: schema + upsert helpers

narrative.Action: Bump SCHEMA_VERSION to 17 in src/lib/database/schema.ts. Add columns to review_status: stuck BOOLEAN DEFAULT 0, stuck_reason TEXT, stuck_at TEXT, stuck_details TEXT (JSON). Add migration block for currentVersion < 17 using ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN in try/catch per column. Export markWorkspaceStuck(issueId, reason, details) and clearWorkspaceStuck(issueId) helpers alongside existing review_status upsert code.

subItems.title: review_status table has stuck, stuck_reason, stuck_at, stuck_details columns after migration from v16
markWorkspaceStuck / clearWorkspaceStuck helpers exist, roundtrip through SQLite, and persist across dashboard restart
Migration is idempotent (re-running does not error if columns already exist)

items.title: Create git_operations SQLite table and git-activity service

narrative.Action: Add git_operations table to schema.ts: id INTEGER PK AUTOINCREMENT, operation TEXT, branch TEXT, issue_id TEXT, before_sha TEXT, after_sha TEXT, remote_sha TEXT, status TEXT, error TEXT, ts TEXT. Create src/dashboard/server/services/git-activity.ts with appendGitOperation() and listGitOperations(filter) functions. Index on (issue_id, ts) and (operation, ts). Survives dashboard restart.

subItems.title: git_operations table exists with all columns and indexes after fresh init and after migration
appendGitOperation and listGitOperations functions work and are used by the activity API
Rows survive a dashboard process restart

narrative.Action: Create src/lib/git/operations.ts exporting gitFetch(cwd, remote, branch), gitPush(cwd, remote, branch, {issueId}), gitForcePush(cwd, remote, branch, {issueId, reason}), gitMerge(cwd, branch), gitRevParse(cwd, ref). Each wraps execAsync, records before/after/remote SHAs via git rev-parse, and emits a structured git.* event through git-activity.ts. gitPush MUST perform a pre-push git fetch + ancestor check and throw MainDivergedError if origin has advanced past the local ancestor. All helpers use execAsync (never execSync).

subItems.title: gitPush throws MainDivergedError when origin/main is not an ancestor of local main
Every helper call writes exactly one row to git_operations with before/after/remote SHAs populated where applicable
Unit tests cover success, non-fast-forward rejection, and divergence cases using mocked execAsync

items.title: Pre-push divergence guard in approve flow

narrative.Action: In src/dashboard/server/routes/workspaces.ts around line 3941, replace the raw `git push origin main` with gitPush() from the new helper. On MainDivergedError: leave local state clean (the existing merge-abort/reset fallback), call markWorkspaceStuck(issueId, 'main_diverged', {localSha, remoteSha}), emit git.main_diverged, return 409 with a human-readable error. Do NOT retry automatically.

subItems.title: Approve flow aborts cleanly on divergence without losing the hotfix commit on origin/main
review_status.stuck is set to 1 with reason='main_diverged' and both SHAs in stuck_details
Integration repro: hotfix push between pull and push is preserved, not clobbered

items.title: Same guard in salvageStrandedMerge + merge-agent push sites

narrative.Action: Route src/lib/cloister/merge-agent.ts salvageStrandedMerge (line 1742), spawnRebaseAgentForBranch (1538), and the auto-revert force-push (1385) through gitPush / gitForcePush helpers. Each emits git.* events. salvageStrandedMerge must mark-stuck on divergence rather than blind-pushing.

subItems.title: salvageStrandedMerge aborts and marks stuck when origin/main has advanced beyond what it intended to push
Rebase force-push and auto-revert force-push both emit git.force_push activity events

items.title: Unstick API endpoint and kanban card UI

narrative.Action: Add POST /api/workspaces/:issueId/unstick that calls clearWorkspaceStuck and emits a domain event. Create StuckBadge.tsx component with red-border card indicator + warning icon when stuck=1. Add an 'Unstick' menu item to the kanban card context menu. No new lane — card stays where it is per the issue comment clarification.

subItems.title: POST /unstick clears stuck flag and re-enables Deacon for that workspace
Kanban card shows red border + warning badge when stuck=1
No new kanban lane added; grid remains at 4 columns

items.title: Pattern-match specialist tmux output into activity feed

narrative.Action: Extend the existing merge-agent specialist polling loop (src/lib/cloister/merge-agent.ts near line 1995) to tail tmux capture-pane output and scan for lines matching git push/fetch/rejected/non-fast-forward/retrying/force-with-lease patterns. Emit each as a git.* activity event. Dedupe by line hash within the session. No raw capture dump into the DB.

subItems.title: User sees 'pushing…', 'rejected non-fast-forward', 'retrying…' events live in the activity panel during an approve
Events are deduped and do not flood the activity table with repeated lines

items.title: Concurrent-merge detection + divergence preview on approve

narrative.Action: When approve starts, check git_operations for a successful git.push to main in the last 30 seconds and surface a warning card. After the initial pull, show 'main has advanced by N commits since you opened this' so the approver knows what they are including.

subItems.title: Approve flow shows a warning when another approve pushed to main in the last 30s
Divergence preview displays commit count delta after pull, before merge-agent runs

items.title: Activity panel: grouping, filtering, warning pinning

narrative.Action: Update src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/ActivityPanel.tsx to group entries by issue/workspace, add event-type filter (git / specialist / sync), and pin warning/error-level entries to the top. Wire the git event stream from the new git_operations SQLite backend. Keep the existing in-memory stream for non-git entries.

subItems.title: Activity panel groups by issue/workspace and filters by event type
git.* events survive a dashboard restart and are visible in the panel
Warning and error entries are pinned to the top of the panel

items.title: Kanban stuck count = union of persistent flag + inactivity heuristic

narrative.Action: Update src/dashboard/server/routes/metrics.ts around line 114 to compute the stuck count as the union of workspaces with review_status.stuck = 1 AND agents with health.state === 'stuck', deduped by issue. Update MetricsSummary.tsx:133 to consume the new field. Verify the stat increments by exactly 1 on divergence-abort and decrements on unstick.

subItems.title: metrics.today.stuckCount reflects the deduped union
Stat increments by exactly 1 when a divergence-abort fires
Stat decrements by exactly 1 when the unstick button is clicked

narrative.Action: Write integration tests reproducing the original bug and verifying the fix. Two concurrent approves against the same repo: one succeeds, second detects divergence, aborts cleanly, marks stuck, Deacon does not respawn, restart persists state, unstick clears it.

subItems.title: Original bug repro test exists and fails on pre-fix code, passes on post-fix
Restart-mid-stuck test confirms persistence across dashboard restart
Concurrent approve test confirms second approve aborts and marks stuck
